title: Story
description: A community-submitted technology link or text post on Lobsters

short_id.description: Short alphanumeric identifier for the story

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the story was submitted

url.description: URL of the linked resource; null for text-only posts

flags.description: Number of flags the story has received

comment_count.description: Total number of comments on the story

description.description: HTML-rendered description or body text for text posts

description_plain.description: Plain text description or body text for text posts

submitter_user.description: Username of the user who submitted the story

user_is_author.description: Whether the submitter is the author of the linked content

tags.description: List of tag names applied to the story, sorted alphabetically
